# SnackPack Universe

> SnackPack Studios builds calm, family-friendly Android apps for early learning, classic offline games, and daily positivity — one shared universe of characters, with no third-party ads and no tracking SDKs in any app. Four apps are live on Google Play; 14+ are planned.

Key facts that apply to every SnackPack app: no third-party ads, no tracking or analytics SDKs, no account required, data stays on the device, and each app has its own named privacy policy. Contact: support@snackpackuniverse.com.

## Live apps (Google Play)

- [SnackPack ABC: Learn to Read](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/apps/snackpack-1-abcs-alphabet/): Free alphabet and early-reading app for ages 3–7 — 26 letters with character-led stories, mini books, a progress bookshelf. No ads, no in-app purchases. Play Store ID: com.snackpackuniverse.abcalphabet
- [SnackPack 123: Learn to Count](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/apps/snackpack-2-123s-counting/): Free counting and early-numeracy app for ages 3–7 — counting 1–20, number shapes, story-led adventures. No ads, no in-app purchases. Play Store ID: com.snackpackuniverse.counting
- [Pawsitive Dose](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/apps/pawsitive-dose/): Free daily mood-boost app for adults — a finite daily batch of animal photos, uplifting quotes, and affirmations with no endless feed, no ads, and no account; reminders and Android widgets included. Optional Pro features. Play Store ID: com.snackpackuniverse.pawsitivedose
- [Snackpack Brain Games](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/apps/snackpack-brain-games/): Free offline collection of nine classics — Sudoku, Solitaire, Minesweeper, 2048, Word Search, Checkers, Connect 4, Reversi, and Cascade — with local stats and streaks, themes, and accessibility options. No ads, no tracking; optional one-time Pro unlock. Play Store ID: com.snackpackuniverse.braingames
- [SnackPack Garden World](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/apps/snackpack-13-garden-world/): Free calm nature learning app for ages 6–12 — six connected habitats, plant and bug discovery, Garden Lens close-up photos, Interactive Viewers, and six ecology mini-games. No ads, no tracking. Privacy policy: https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/privacy/snackpack-13-garden-world/. Play Store ID: com.snackpackuniverse.gardenworld

## Coming soon

- [Snackpack Brain Games Vol 2](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/apps/snackpack-brain-games-vol-2/): A second collection of calm, offline classic games — Flappy Snacky, Snacky Worm, Table Tennis, Snakes & Ladders, Picross, Thirteen, Asteroid Destroyer, and a themed Crossword. No ads, no tracking. Coming soon to Android (Play Store ID com.snackpackuniverse.braingames2); Flappy Snacky and Snacky Worm are playable free in the web arcade now.

## Play free in your browser (web arcade)

- [SnackPack Arcade](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/): Free classic games playable instantly in the browser — no ads, no sign-in, no download. A taster for the Snackpack Brain Games Android app.
- [Play Minesweeper](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/minesweeper/): Free browser Minesweeper with flags, a timer, and Beginner/Intermediate/Expert boards; first click always safe. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play 2048](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/2048/): Free browser 2048 — slide and merge tiles to reach 2048; arrow keys or swipe, best score saved locally. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Connect 4](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/connect-4/): Free browser Connect 4 vs a computer opponent with three difficulty levels. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Sudoku](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/sudoku/): Free browser Sudoku with Easy/Medium/Hard/Expert puzzles (unique solutions), pencil notes, hints and mistake checking. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Word Search](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/word-search/): Free browser Word Search across themed word lists (Animals, Food, Nature, Space); drag or tap to find words in any of eight directions. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Solitaire](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/solitaire/): Free browser Klondike Solitaire with Draw 1 and Draw 3 modes, click-to-move, undo, timer and move counter. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Checkers](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/checkers/): Free browser Checkers (draughts) vs a computer opponent with three difficulty levels, compulsory captures, multi-jumps and kings. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Reversi](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/reversi/): Free browser Reversi / Othello vs a computer opponent with three difficulty levels, legal-move hints, corner-aware AI and pass handling. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Cascade](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/cascade/): Free browser Cascade — a calm falling-blocks puzzle (the SnackPack take on tetromino stacking) with Normal and Turbo modes, keyboard and touch controls, and saved best score. Includes rules, strategy, and history.
- [Play Flappy Snacky](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/flappy-snacky/): Free browser Flappy Snacky — a one-button tap-to-fly arcade game with Classic, Hard and Night modes and a saved best score. From Brain Games Vol 2 (Play Store ID com.snackpackuniverse.braingames2). Includes rules, tips, and an about section.
- [Play Snacky Worm](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/snacky-worm/): Free browser Snacky Worm — the classic Snake game with Classic, Zen (wrap) and Speed modes and a saved best score. From Brain Games Vol 2. Includes rules, tips, and an about section.

## World Cup 2026 (free soccer games & tournament tracker)

Original SnackPack browser soccer games and a 2026 tournament tracker. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to FIFA, the World Cup, any national team, league, or governing body. No ads, no sign-in, no download.

- [World Cup 2026 hub](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/): Free soccer games for the 2026 football summer plus a tournament tracker (schedule, teams, bracket and predictions).
- [Schedule](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/schedule/): Today's matches and what's on next, for quick answers.
- [All 48 teams](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/teams/): Every team with flags, groups, players to know, and short facts.
- [Bracket tracker](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/bracket/): Group tables, played and upcoming fixtures, knockout placeholders, and saveable champion/top-scorer predictions with a shareable card.
- Group pages (table, results, and all six fixtures for each group): [Group A](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-a/), [Group B](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-b/), [Group C](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-c/), [Group D](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-d/), [Group E](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-e/), [Group F](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-f/), [Group G](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-g/), [Group H](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-h/), [Group I](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-i/), [Group J](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-j/), [Group K](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-k/), [Group L](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/world-cup/group-l/).
- [Soccer Trivia Sprint](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/soccer-trivia-sprint/): Fast football quiz — build a streak and chase your best score across 12 rounds.
- [Keepy-Uppy](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/keepy-uppy/): Tap to keep the ball up, collect stars and build combos for a new best touch run.
- [Target Shooting Arena](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/target-shooting-arena/): Aim at moving goal targets, score bullseyes, and protect your combo across 12 shots.
- [Free Kick Curl](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/free-kick-curl/): Bend shots around the wall, beat the keeper and hit bonus corners across 10 kicks.
- [Crossbar Challenge](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/crossbar-challenge/): Hit the bar from changing distances, fight the wind, and stack perfect hits across 15 shots.
- [Goalkeeper Hero](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/goalkeeper-hero/): Read the striker, dive the right way, and stack quick saves across 12 shots.
- [Penalty Shootout](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/penalty-shootout/): Best-of-five penalty shootout vs the computer — you both shoot and dive to save, with three difficulty levels and sudden death. Includes rules, tips, and an about section.
- [Dribble Rush](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/dribble-rush/): Endless three-lane soccer runner — dodge defenders, hop sliding tackles, collect stars, and chase your best distance across three difficulty modes.
- [Header Hero](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/header-hero/): Aim your header, time your jump, and beat the keeper across 12 crosses; perfect timing always scores.
- [Flag Frenzy](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/play/flag-frenzy/): Daily guessing game — find the mystery World Cup 2026 team in 6 tries using confederation, group, points and live status clues, with a shareable result.

## Guides

- [Choosing ad-free learning apps for toddlers](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/guides/best-ad-free-apps-for-toddlers/): A 5-point checklist for verifying "no ads" claims, reading the Data safety section, and spotting manipulative design in kids apps.
- [Offline games without ads](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/guides/offline-games-without-ads/): Why most Sudoku/Solitaire apps are ad-funded, how to check before installing, and the airplane-mode test.
- [A daily mood boost without doomscrolling](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/guides/daily-positivity-without-doomscrolling/): How to redirect the phone reflex toward finite, calm alternatives to engagement-ranked feeds.

## Reference

- [All apps](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/apps/): Full lineup including the 10+ apps in development (spelling, arithmetic, stories, creativity, geography, geometry, coding logic, dinosaurs, animals, gardens).
- [Privacy policies](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/privacy/): Per-app privacy policies meeting Google Play and Apple requirements.
- [Terms](https://www.snackpackuniverse.com/terms/)
